title: Conduct photography for fieldwork
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct photography for fieldwork demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to take photographs

pcs.text: Determine the purpose and intended use of photographs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the purpose and intended use of photographs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the purpose and intended use of photographs.

pcs.text: Prepare a photograph specification for subject, purpose and requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare a photograph specification for subject, purpose and requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare a photograph specification for subject, purpose and requirements.

pcs.text: Assess workplace health and safety hazards and risks for fieldwork photography, and apply controls according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess workplace health and safety hazards and risks for fieldwork photography, and apply controls according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess workplace health and safety hazards and risks for fieldwork photography, and apply controls according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Confirm permits and releases have been obtained according to workplace procedures and copyright requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm permits and releases have been obtained according to workplace procedures and copyright requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm permits and releases have been obtained according to workplace procedures and copyright requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to take photographs

elements.title: Identify and select appropriate equipment

pcs.text: Select camera suitability for the intended use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select camera suitability for the intended use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select camera suitability for the intended use.

pcs.text: Select and prepare photographic equipment and accessories required to capture intended images
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and prepare photographic equipment and accessories required to capture intended images?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and prepare photographic equipment and accessories required to capture intended images.

pcs.text: Transport and store photographic equipment and accessories to prevent damage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transport and store photographic equipment and accessories to prevent damage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transport and store photographic equipment and accessories to prevent damage.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify and select appropriate equipment

elements.title: Take photos using correct methods and techniques

pcs.text: Implement safety controls and safe work practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement safety controls and safe work practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement safety controls and safe work practices.

pcs.text: Select and set up camera in position to take photographs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and set up camera in position to take photographs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and set up camera in position to take photographs.

pcs.text: Select camera settings to suit conditions and subject
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select camera settings to suit conditions and subject?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select camera settings to suit conditions and subject.

pcs.text: Select the perspective, framing and sequencing of photographs according to subject and purpose of photographs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select the perspective, framing and sequencing of photographs according to subject and purpose of photographs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select the perspective, framing and sequencing of photographs according to subject and purpose of photographs.

pcs.text: Capture photograph and check image according to selected camera type to ensure fit for purpose
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Capture photograph and check image according to selected camera type to ensure fit for purpose?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Capture photograph and check image according to selected camera type to ensure fit for purpose.

pcs.text: Apply specialist photography techniques appropriate to subject, environment and purpose
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply specialist photography techniques appropriate to subject, environment and purpose?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply specialist photography techniques appropriate to subject, environment and purpose.

pcs.text: Record field notes according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record field notes according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record field notes according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Take photos using correct methods and techniques

elements.title: Store and catalogue photographs

pcs.text: Transfer photographs from camera for storage according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transfer photographs from camera for storage according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transfer photographs from camera for storage according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Maintain photograph records and filing system according to workplace procedures and copyright requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain photograph records and filing system according to workplace procedures and copyright requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain photograph records and filing system according to workplace procedures and copyright requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Store and catalogue photographs

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
